name: Cheese Scalloped Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. This delicious side dish has a custard-like consistency.
2. Beat eggs in a large mixing bowl; stir in remaining ingredients.
3. Spoon mixture into 2 greased 1-quart casseroles.
4. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for about 35-40 minutes.
5. Makes 8-10 servings.
